body:
<!--- THESE LINES ARE COMMENTED -->
## Purpose 
If we use weak divergence for advection, then no mass is transported between elements until the DSS operation is performed. This means that we can guarantee that the total mass in the element is non-negative (and so don't need to borrow horizontally).

title: Use weak divergence in scalar advection

Use surface updraft area parameter in EDMFX boundary condition

body:
Content
- Removes `entr_coeff` `detr_coeff` and `entr_tau` from the config, makes them parameters
- - Update `edmfx_bomex_box_v2.toml` to include the `detr_coeff` change
- Adds  parameters for previously hardcoded values in the held suarez `forcing_tendency`, update the parameter struct accordingly
- Removes `SpongeParameters` - I think we can keep these in the top-level struct
- Improves the parameter functions, auto-generate them using `@eval`
- Adds some tests to ensure parameters are properly read in. I introduced a bug in the atmos tomls where different parameters had the same alias, leading to parameters not being properly set. This bug has been fixed by [ClimaParameters #136](https://github.com/CliMA/CLIMAParameters.jl/pull/136), which also includes an error check for unique aliases.

Note: This does not get rid of all hardcoded parameters, only the high-priority ones.
title: Remove hardcoded parameters, minor improvements for parameters-as-functions
